subject: A hooded blue-robed figure (Jace Beleren, the Mind Sculptor planeswalker) seen in a tight close-up, head bowed and partly obscured by a deep cowl, with an intricate luminous sigil or arcane diagram glowing across the brow and forehead
description: An extreme close-up of a cowled figure in deep blue hooded robes, head tilted slightly downward so the eyes are hidden in shadow under the hood. A bright cyan-white glyph of interlocking lines and runes is etched in light across the figure's brow, casting cool illumination onto the cheekbones and the inside of the hood. Behind the figure, soft swirling currents of pale blue magical energy diffuse into a darker indigo background. The mood is contemplative and cerebral rather than combative — a moment of inward focus or psychic concentration rather than an outward display of force.
foreground: cowled robed figure with glowing arcane sigil across the forehead
background: diffuse swirling blue magical aura fading into dark indigo
emotion: inward, meditative, focused — eyes lowered or hidden, body still
